title: Generational
description:
WIP
a 1.21.1 modpack for the Camelot discord server
primarily uses modrinth mods, but curseforge mods are also present where unavailable or outdated
a bit of a kitchen-sink pack, with a focus on Create & Oritech for the primary tech mods
body: A modpack with a bit of everything! Motivated by the release of Create for 1.21.1, it is the primary tech mod present. Several magic mods (including Iron's Spells and Mahou Tsukai) and decoration mods (Chipped, Reshiseled, Yuushya). Utility mods to provide functionality and performace are also present (Spark, Polymorph, Mouse Tweaks). World generation is there to explore and structures are present to explore.
